emails.subject: Taco Bell
emails.body: Taco Bell Hey Chris, Just wanted to thank you again for the taco bell dog. That was very sweet of you. Hope your holidays went well. See you later. Maria

emails.body: Re: Taco Bell HEY!! I'm a sweet guy, modest too. Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! Enron North America Corp. From: Maria Garza 12/22/2000 03:40 PM
